title: Venus vor Gericht
actors: Hannes Stelzer, Hansi Knoteck, Paul Dahlke
plot: A sculptor, an enemy of modern art, sets an example. He sculpts a statue of Venus in the style of the Greek antiquity and buries it in a forest. When it's dug up in 1930, it's considered to be a 2 000 year old, antique statue.
